about.lead: I build fast, structured, and conversion-ready digital systems.
paragraphs: I’m a front-end and WordPress developer combining clean UI, performance-focused development, on-page SEO, and GoHighLevel automation to help businesses capture leads and scale efficiently.
I work with business owners, recruiters, and technical teams who value clarity, clean implementation, and systems built for long-term growth.
If you share your site or funnel and your goal, I’ll reply with the simplest path to “done.”
bullets: Custom WordPress builds, redesigns, and maintenance (clean structure + scalable setup)
Performance optimization (Core Web Vitals mindset: LCP/CLS, image + asset strategy)
On-page SEO implementation (metadata, heading structure, internal linking, schema)
GoHighLevel funnels + CRM workflows (automation-driven lead capture + follow-ups)
Technical support that’s reliable and process-based (not random fixes)

whatImDoing.title: Web Development
whatImDoing.desc: Website development using WordPress and modern CMS platforms, focused on clean structure, performance, and scalable architecture.

whatImDoing.title: GoHighLevel & AI Automations
whatImDoing.desc: Funnels, CRM workflows, AI-powered automations, and integrations to streamline lead capture and follow-ups.

whatImDoing.title: On-Page SEO
whatImDoing.desc: Technical SEO implementation ensuring websites are structured, index-ready, and optimized for search engines.

whatImDoing.title: Technical Virtual Assistance
whatImDoing.desc: Reliable backend support across websites, funnels, and automation systems.

whatImDoing.title: Teaching & Technical Guidance
whatImDoing.desc: Practical guidance for web/CMS workflows, structure, and implementation.

testimonials.name: Edwin Goh
testimonials.quote: Reynald Toledo developed and manages our website with great skill and professionalism. The site is visually appealing, functional, and user-friendly. Reynald is always quick to implement updates and provides excellent support.

testimonials.name: Stephen Gardner
testimonials.quote: Due to reasons beyond his control, I only got to work with Reynald briefly, but his communication, responsiveness, and personality shined through. I definitely will use him again in the future if the need arises.

testimonials.name: Lolita De Leon
testimonials.quote: You did a great job creating my online franchise website. Your attention to detail and ability to follow my instructions made the process smooth and easy. You captured the essence of my brand and translated it into a visually appealing design.

testimonials.name: Anna Bruzon Rafallo
testimonials.quote: Demonstrated impressive ICT skills, simplifying complex concepts and creating inventive lesson plans.

testimonials.name: Caroline Sumande
testimonials.quote: Exceptional administrative skills with strong communication, adaptability, and problem-solving abilities.

headline.title: Headline
headline.strong: WordPress Developer | SEO Specialist | Virtual Assistant
headline.text: Web Developer with 3+ years of experience specializing in WordPress development, plugin development/customization, on-page SEO, and responsive UI/UX. Proven success working with international clients and improving performance + conversions. Trained in virtual assistance, B2B communication, and lead generation.

coreStrengths.title: Core Strengths
items: WordPress builds, maintenance, and plugin customization
On-page SEO implementation (structure, metadata, internal linking)
GoHighLevel funnels, workflows, CRM setup + Zapier integrations
Reliable technical VA support (updates, troubleshooting, execution)

workExperience.title: Web Developer — PropertyNet (Singapore)
bullets: Built and maintained responsive WordPress websites for real estate clients, supporting property listing workflows.
Developed and customized WordPress plugins to automate listing updates and map-based location features.
Optimized themes/plugins for SEO and speed, targeting sub-2-second load times.

workExperience.title: Website Developer / Manager — Stephen Gardner SEO (USA)
bullets: Managed multiple WordPress websites for a U.S.-based public figure.
Performed content updates, bug fixes, and performance optimizations.
Coordinated with the team using Google Workspace and Asana to hit publishing deadlines.

workExperience.title: Web Developer — Lolita Shop Links (USA)
bullets: Designed and deployed an e-commerce website.
Improved UI/UX and contributed to a 30% increase in online sales.

projectExperience.title: Local Jungle — WordPress Website (Auto Repair)
bullets: Built and customized a responsive WordPress website for a local auto repair business.
Implemented basic on-page SEO (meta tags, internal links).
Improved site speed by compressing images and removing unused plugins.

projectExperience.title: Website Digital Solution — Website & Mobile App Dev
bullets: Developed a mobile-first e-commerce website using WordPress + WooCommerce.
Integrated chat and analytics tools for user tracking.

projectExperience.title: Bloggy Mary — Virtual Assistant Training
bullets: Completed VA training focused on admin support workflows and digital execution.

education.title: Polytechnic University of the Philippines
education.desc: Bachelor in Business Technology Livelihood Education (BBTLeD), major in Information Communication Technology.

contact.lead: Tell me what you’re building and what “done” looks like. I’ll reply with the next steps and timeline.
contact.cardText: Best for: WordPress builds, fixes, performance (90+), on-page SEO, and GHL funnel pages.

form.hint: No spam. Clear, direct replies only.
